content.query:
DROP VIEW [ODS].[vw_lkp_LP_SourceCodes]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE VIEW [ODS].[vw_lkp_LP_SourceCodes]
AS SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'FHI' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'PHI' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'HSI' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'RTW' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'MAC' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'SWR' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'PBC' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_src_SourceCodes]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'MXH' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MXH_src_SourceCodes]
 
  UNION

 SELECT
[SourceCode]
,[id]
,'CTA' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_CTA_src_SourceCodes];
GO
